steps.title: Validate first-run bootstrap prerequisites
preconditions: GitHub App credentials are configured for the repository workflow environment.
The JSON SSOT plan is available for downstream projection work.
actions: Confirm bootstrap-github-fields is present and callable by manual workflow dispatch.
Confirm command_spec.json includes the command surface needed after bootstrap.
Confirm config/github_field_registry.json is either absent, empty, or marked for regeneration.
done_criteria: bootstrap-github-fields is present as an accessible workflow artifact.
config/github_field_registry.json exists or is explicitly queued for bootstrap regeneration.

failure_codes.BOOTSTRAP_WORKFLOW_MISSING: Bootstrap workflow artifact is not present.
failure_codes.FIELD_REGISTRY_PRECHECK_FAILED: Field registry prerequisite state is invalid for first run.

steps.title: Run field registry bootstrap discovery
preconditions: GitHub App installation token path is configured for the workflow.
Project field discovery is permitted for the target GitHub Project.
actions: Dispatch bootstrap-github-fields manually.
Query GitHub Project field metadata using GitHub App auth.
Write discovered field IDs and option IDs into config/github_field_registry.json.
done_criteria: Workflow run exits with status success.

failure_codes.GH_APP_AUTH_UNAVAILABLE: GitHub App token could not be issued.
failure_codes.FIELD_DISCOVERY_FAILED: Project field discovery did not complete successfully.

steps.title: Validate create_step command inputs
preconditions: Requested step exists in JSON SSOT plan context.
GitHub App installation token path is available for Projects mutation.
actions: Load create_step request schema from command_spec.json.
Validate required inputs and reject if the linkage already exists without explicit overwrite semantics.
Load config/github_field_registry.json and config/step_issue_linkage.json.
done_criteria: command_spec.json contains the create_step command definition.

failure_codes.STEP_NOT_FOUND: Requested step is not present in the plan.
failure_codes.STEP_ALREADY_LINKED: Step already exists in linkage file.

steps.title: Create issue and project item for step
preconditions: GitHub App installation token is valid.
Projection data for the step is available.
actions: Execute create_step.
Create the issue if no linkage exists.
Add the issue to the GitHub Project and set automation-owned fields using config/github_field_registry.json.
Update config/step_issue_linkage.json with issue_number, project_item_id, and projection metadata.
done_criteria: config/step_issue_linkage.json contains an entry for the requested step.
If projections/projection_manifest.json contains the step, its step_id matches the linkage entry.

failure_codes.FIELD_SET_FAILED: One or more Project field mutations failed.

steps.title: Validate create_subissue parent and child linkage prerequisites
preconditions: Parent execution issue exists in linkage file.
Child step is defined in the SSOT plan.
GitHub App auth path is available.
actions: Load create_subissue schema from command_spec.json.
Check that parent step maps to an existing issue in config/step_issue_linkage.json.
Reject the command if the child is already linked.
done_criteria: config/step_issue_linkage.json contains the parent step linkage.

failure_codes.PARENT_NOT_LINKED: Parent issue is not present in linkage file.
failure_codes.CHILD_ALREADY_LINKED: Child step already has an issue linkage.

steps.title: Create and link sub-issue
preconditions: GitHub App installation token is valid.
actions: Execute create_subissue.
Create the child issue if required.
Link child issue to parent issue.
Write child linkage and parent_step_id into config/step_issue_linkage.json.
done_criteria: config/step_issue_linkage.json contains the child step linkage.

failure_codes.LINKAGE_WRITE_FAILED: Updated linkage file could not be written.

steps.title: Validate milestone assignment request
preconditions: Target steps are already linked to issues.
Milestone grouping exists in plan or projection context.
actions: Load assign_milestone schema from command_spec.json.
Resolve requested step_ids against config/step_issue_linkage.json.
Validate milestone title against projections/projection_manifest.json when present.
done_criteria: All requested step_ids resolve to linked issues.

failure_codes.STEP_LINKAGE_MISSING: One or more step linkages are missing.
failure_codes.INVALID_MILESTONE_GROUP: Milestone title does not match allowed grouping.

steps.title: Create or assign milestone to linked issues
preconditions: GitHub App or allowed issue/milestone auth path is valid.
actions: Execute assign_milestone.
Create milestone if absent.
Assign milestone to each linked issue.
Update config/step_issue_linkage.json milestone_title or milestone metadata if tracked.

failure_codes.ISSUE_MILESTONE_ASSIGN_FAILED: Milestone assignment to one or more issues failed.
failure_codes.LINKAGE_UPDATE_FAILED: Linkage persistence failed after milestone assignment.

steps.title: Validate phase sync request against registry and plan state
preconditions: Phase value exists in the plan/projection context.
actions: Load sync_phase schema from command_spec.json.
Validate phase target against projections/projection_manifest.json when present.
Load config/github_field_registry.json and step linkage data.

failure_codes.INVALID_PHASE: Phase is not defined in projection context.
failure_codes.LINKAGE_MISSING: Step linkage required for phase sync is missing.

steps.title: Apply phase projection sync without violating phase advancement law
preconditions: GitHub App installation token is valid.
Requested write does not violate the rule that only evaluator advances the Phase field as a lifecycle transition.
actions: Execute sync_phase in projection mode only.
Ensure items exist in the project.
Update allowed metadata such as PlanHash and ProjectionVersion.
Write any resulting linkage or projection evidence updates.
done_criteria: No unauthorized Phase transition is performed outside evaluator-controlled flow.

failure_codes.PHASE_WRITE_FORBIDDEN: Phase write attempted outside evaluator authority.
failure_codes.PROJECT_SYNC_FAILED: One or more Project item sync operations failed.

steps.title: Load desired and observed state inputs for drift reconciliation
preconditions: Projection manifest exists for desired state comparison.
actions: Load reconcile_drift schema from command_spec.json.
Load registry, linkage, and projection data.
Validate that GitHub App auth is available for Project queries.

failure_codes.DESIRED_STATE_MISSING: One or more desired-state artifacts are missing.
failure_codes.FIELD_REGISTRY_INVALID: Field registry cannot be used for reconciliation.

steps.title: Classify and correct drift where safe
preconditions: GitHub App installation token is valid.
actions: Execute reconcile_drift.
Classify missing steps, orphan issues, unauthorized field edits, and stale projection state.
Apply safe corrective writes only.
Persist updated linkage if missing items are created or corrected.
done_criteria: Any created issue or project item is reflected in linkage state.

failure_codes.RECONCILIATION_QUERY_FAILED: Observed state could not be queried.
failure_codes.LINKAGE_PERSIST_FAILED: Corrected linkage state could not be written.

steps.title: Generate projection manifest from updated SSOT plan files
preconditions: SSOT plan changes are pushed to the tracked branch/path set.
Bootstrap has completed successfully at least once.
actions: Run gh-projection-generate on push or manual dispatch.
Generate projections/projection_manifest.json from SSOT data.
Make projection manifest available for apply stage.

steps.title: Apply generated projection to GitHub execution surface
preconditions: GitHub App installation token is available.
actions: Dispatch gh-projection-apply.
Create or update issues, milestones, and project items based on projection manifest.
Write config/step_issue_linkage.json.
done_criteria: config/step_issue_linkage.json is non-empty after apply when projection contains steps.

failure_codes.FIELD_REGISTRY_MISSING: Field registry required for apply is missing.

steps.title: Run scheduled drift reconciliation loop
actions: Run ssot-drift-reconciliation on schedule.
Observe current GitHub state.
Diff desired and observed state.
Correct safe drift and persist any linkage changes.

failure_codes.DESIRED_STATE_UNAVAILABLE: Desired-state artifacts were unavailable at runtime.

steps.title: Run periodic backlog hygiene scan
actions: Run backlog-hygiene on schedule.
Scan for stuck items, missing fields, and stale backlog state.
Emit workflow result for downstream review.

failure_codes.HYGIENE_SCAN_FAILED: Backlog hygiene scan did not complete.

steps.title: Seal evidence after required gates pass
preconditions: Existing CI and gate workflows completed successfully.
Evidence artifacts for the run are available.
actions: Run evidence-seal after successful gate completion.
Post evidence comment to linked issue.
Set EvidenceState to Sealed and GateStatus to Passed.
done_criteria: Linked issue evidence update is reflected through successful workflow completion.

failure_codes.EVIDENCE_LINKAGE_FAILED: Linked issue could not be resolved.
failure_codes.EVIDENCE_SEAL_FAILED: Evidence state could not be sealed.
failure_codes.GATE_STATUS_UPDATE_FAILED: Gate status could not be updated.

steps.title: Evaluate phase advancement using composite state
preconditions: All prerequisite CI, evidence, and completion gates have run.
actions: Run phase-advancement-evaluator.
Evaluate issue closure, evidence state, gate state, and milestone/completion context.
Advance phase only if composite criteria are satisfied.
done_criteria: No phase advancement occurs unless composite evaluator completes successfully.

failure_codes.PHASE_EVALUATION_FAILED: Phase evaluator failed to produce a valid decision.
failure_codes.FIELD_WRITE_FAILED: Authorized phase or metadata update failed.

steps.title: Load abstraction governance patch sources and implementation instructions
actions: Confirm cleaned_final_abstraction_patch_plan.json exists.
Confirm CLI_ready_implementation_instructions_abstraction_governance.json exists.
Confirm implementation instructions expose STEP-001 through STEP-006.

failure_codes.PATCH_PLAN_MISSING: Abstraction patch plan file is missing.
failure_codes.IMPLEMENTATION_INSTRUCTIONS_MISSING: CLI implementation instructions file is missing.

steps.title: Execute governance upgrade STEP-001
actions: Load STEP-001 from CLI implementation instructions.
Apply the corresponding patch segment from cleaned_final_abstraction_patch_plan.json.
Write resulting file modifications.
done_criteria: CLI exits with code 0 for STEP-001 execution.
STEP-001 is marked complete in observable CLI output or evidence file.

failure_codes.STEP_001_NOT_FOUND: STEP-001 is missing from implementation instructions.

steps.title: Execute governance upgrade STEP-002
actions: Load STEP-002 from CLI implementation instructions.
Apply STEP-002 modifications from patch plan.
Persist modified artifacts.
done_criteria: CLI exits with code 0 for STEP-002.
Observable patch application output is produced.

failure_codes.STEP_002_NOT_FOUND: STEP-002 is missing from implementation instructions.

steps.title: Execute governance upgrade STEP-003
actions: Load STEP-003 from CLI implementation instructions.
Apply STEP-003 modifications from patch plan.
Persist modified artifacts.
done_criteria: CLI exits with code 0 for STEP-003.
Observable patch application output is produced.

failure_codes.STEP_003_NOT_FOUND: STEP-003 is missing from implementation instructions.

steps.title: Execute governance upgrade STEP-004
actions: Load STEP-004 from CLI implementation instructions.
Apply STEP-004 modifications from patch plan.
Persist modified artifacts.
done_criteria: CLI exits with code 0 for STEP-004.
Observable patch application output is produced.

failure_codes.STEP_004_NOT_FOUND: STEP-004 is missing from implementation instructions.

steps.title: Execute governance upgrade STEP-005
actions: Load STEP-005 from CLI implementation instructions.
Apply STEP-005 modifications from patch plan.
Persist modified artifacts.
done_criteria: CLI exits with code 0 for STEP-005.
Observable patch application output is produced.

failure_codes.STEP_005_NOT_FOUND: STEP-005 is missing from implementation instructions.

steps.title: Execute governance upgrade STEP-006
actions: Load STEP-006 from CLI implementation instructions.
Apply STEP-006 modifications from patch plan.
Persist modified artifacts.
done_criteria: CLI exits with code 0 for STEP-006.
Observable patch application output is produced.

failure_codes.STEP_006_NOT_FOUND: STEP-006 is missing from implementation instructions.

steps.title: Run GATE-ABS-001 validator
preconditions: Relevant upgrade steps have been applied.
actions: Run the validator script mapped to GATE-ABS-001.
Capture exit code and emitted validation output.

steps.title: Run GATE-ABS-002 validator
actions: Run the validator script mapped to GATE-ABS-002.
Capture exit code and emitted validation output.

steps.title: Run GATE-ABS-003 validator
actions: Run the validator script mapped to GATE-ABS-003.
Capture exit code and emitted validation output.

steps.title: Run GATE-ABS-004 validator
actions: Run the validator script mapped to GATE-ABS-004.
Capture exit code and emitted validation output.

steps.title: Run GATE-ABS-005 validator
actions: Run the validator script mapped to GATE-ABS-005.
Capture exit code and emitted validation output.

cross_cutting_rules: JSON plan is SSOT. GitHub is the execution surface only.
GitHub App installation token is required for all GraphQL and Projects operations.
Every step must identify its owner as cli, github_actions, validator, or human.
Completion is validated by observable output only.
A non-zero exit from a blocking gate or command stops progression.
Every step must write or reference named evidence before being considered done.
No phase advancement is allowed from a single event alone; composite evaluation is required.
No execution issue is considered valid unless it can be linked through config/step_issue_linkage.json.
Machine-verifiable done criteria take precedence over comments, summaries, or AI claims.

known_blockers.description: If GitHub App installation token issuance is not configured, all Project and GraphQL operations are blocked.
Missing or invalid config/github_field_registry.json blocks all field-based projection, reconciliation, and phase evaluation work.
Missing or corrupt config/step_issue_linkage.json breaks traceability and prevents deterministic issue/project updates.
Missing projections/projection_manifest.json prevents deterministic apply, reconciliation, and phase evaluation against desired state.

If cleaned_final_abstraction_patch_plan.json or CLI_ready_implementation_instructions_abstraction_governance.json is missing or incomplete, the abstraction governance upgrade cannot proceed deterministically.
If the validate_abstraction_*.py validator set is missing or not executable, none of the abstraction governance gates can be satisfied.
